room.caption: [56] But not the end of the world.

instance.creationCode: bShowArrow=true exitType=1 newMapX=3296 newMapY=288 toRoom=rMain_55 colorChange=1
sprite_index=sNormalDoor bShowArrow=true exitType=0 newMapX=64 newMapY=208 toRoom=rMain_56Gate
sprite_index=sPitfallSign stringToShow="Not a good idea to go down there." signSize=1

boxSize=2 stringToShow="I don't know how much has been altered by the Virus in that Gate. Keep your guard up." image_xscale=1 image_speed=0.2 if global.gameProgress<=3350 or global.gameProgress>=3870 {instance_destroy()}
